evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap 39: QTc Safety Alert (EP)
gapsPushIds: QTc ${severity}: ${labValues[
evaluatorBlocks.name: Gap-39

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap EP-OAC: Oral Anticoagulation Missing in AFib — full CHA₂DS₂-VASc scoring
gapsPushIds: Oral anticoagulant not prescribed in AFib
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-OAC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-006 SAFETY: Dabigatran contraindicated in CrCl<30 severe renal impairment
gapsPushIds: SAFETY: Dabigatran contraindicated in severe renal impairment (eGFR<30)
eGFR measurement required to evaluate dabigatran safety in renal impairment
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-006

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-003: Rivaroxaban renal dose not adjusted for CrCl.
gapsPushIds: DOAC dose not adjusted for renal function (rivaroxaban)
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-003

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-004: Apixaban dose-reduction criteria met but on full 5 mg dose.
gapsPushIds: Apixaban dose reduction criteria met but on full dose
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-004

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-005: Apixaban inappropriately reduced to 2.5 mg without dose-reduction criteria (reduced efficacy).
gapsPushIds: Apixaban inappropriately reduced without criteria
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-005

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-008: DOAC contraindicated in NONRHEUMATIC moderate-severe mitral stenosis (warfarin required).
gapsPushIds: DOAC contraindicated in moderate-severe mitral stenosis
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-008

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-009: Edoxaban reduced efficacy at high CrCl (CrCl>95).
gapsPushIds: Edoxaban reduced efficacy at high CrCl
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-009

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-012: LAAC evaluation for high stroke risk with prior major bleed.
gapsPushIds: LAAC evaluation for high stroke risk with prior major bleed
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-012

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-014: AF ablation not referred in HFrEF (CASTLE-AF). COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: AF ablation not referred in HFrEF (CASTLE-AF)
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-014

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-071: Anticoagulation not continued after AF ablation. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: Anticoagulation not continued after AF ablation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-071

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-072: Redo AF ablation evaluation after recurrence. COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: Redo AF ablation evaluation after recurrence
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-072

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-074: CTI ablation not offered for typical atrial flutter. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: CTI ablation not offered for typical atrial flutter
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-074

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-076: SVT ablation not offered for recurrent SVT on antiarrhythmic. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: SVT ablation not offered for recurrent SVT on antiarrhythmic
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-076

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-020: VT catheter ablation not offered for ischemic VT on antiarrhythmic. COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: VT catheter ablation not offered for ischemic VT on antiarrhythmic
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-020

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-021: VT substrate evaluation not pursued in non-ischemic cardiomyopathy. COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: VT substrate evaluation not pursued in non-ischemic cardiomyopathy
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-021

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-022: VT ablation not considered before amiodarone escalation (VANISH). COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: VT ablation not considered before amiodarone escalation (VANISH)
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-022

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-029: Pacemaker not implanted for Class I bradycardia indication. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: Pacemaker not implanted for Class I bradycardia indication
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-029

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-034 (covers EP-090): Full CIED system extraction not performed for device infection. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: Full CIED system extraction not performed for device infection
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-034

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-092: S-ICD not considered for young primary-prevention ICD candidate without pacing need. COR 2a.
gapsPushIds: S-ICD not considered for young primary-prevention ICD candidate without pacing need
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-092

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-030: Symptomatic bradycardia on AV-nodal blocker - reduce/stop the drug before a pacer decision. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: Bradycardia on AV-nodal blocker: reduce drug before pacemaker decision
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-030

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-033: Chronic AF with awake HR<40 on rate-control - adjust meds vs permanent pacing. COR.
gapsPushIds: Chronic AF with HR<40 on rate control: adjust medication vs pacing
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-033

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-097: Orthostatic hypotension on BP-lowering therapy - medication review. COR 1.
gapsPushIds: Orthostatic hypotension on BP-lowering therapy: medication review
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-097

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-067: Post-LAAC antithrombotic protocol - patient on NO antithrombotic after LAAC. COR.
gapsPushIds: Post-LAAC patient not on any antithrombotic therapy
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-067

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-079 CRITICAL: Pre-excited AF + AVN blocker contraindicated (risk of VF)
gapsPushIds: CRITICAL: AV nodal blocker contraindicated in pre-excited AF (WPW + AF) — risk of ventricular fibrillation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-079

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-LAAC: LAAC Device Evaluation for AFib with OAC Contraindication
gapsPushIds: Consider LAAC device evaluation for AFib with OAC contraindication
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-LAAC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-ABLATION: AFib catheter-ablation candidate (symptomatic AF on antiarrhythmic, NOT yet ablated)
gapsPushIds: Consider AFib catheter ablation referral (symptomatic AF on antiarrhythmic)
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-ABLATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-DEVICE-ICD: ICD Evaluation in HFrEF
gapsPushIds: Consider ICD evaluation for primary prevention in HFrEF
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-DEVICE-ICD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-DEVICE-CRT: CRT Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider CRT evaluation for LVEF <=35% with wide QRS
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-DEVICE-CRT

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-AMIODARONE-MONITOR: Amiodarone Toxicity Monitoring
gapsPushIds: Amiodarone toxicity monitoring recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-AMIODARONE-MONITOR

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-DOFETILIDE-REMS: Dofetilide REMS Compliance
gapsPushIds: Dofetilide REMS monitoring recommended for review
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-DOFETILIDE-REMS

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-SYNCOPE: Syncope Workup
gapsPushIds: Consider syncope workup evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-SYNCOPE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-REMOTE-MONITORING: Device Remote Monitoring
gapsPushIds: Consider remote monitoring enrollment for cardiac implantable device
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-REMOTE-MONITORING

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // Gap EP-RC + EP-017: Rate Control in AFib (HFrEF-aware)
gapsPushIds: SAFETY: Non-DHP CCB (diltiazem/verapamil) is contraindicated in HFrEF
LVEF measurement required to safely guide AF rate-control therapy in HF patient
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-RC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-017 SAFETY: HFrEF + on non-DHP CCB → fire SAFETY gap (Class 3 Harm).
gapsPushIds: SAFETY: Non-DHP CCB (diltiazem/verapamil) is contraindicated in HFrEF
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-017

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-CSP: Conduction System Pacing Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider conduction system pacing evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-CSP

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-PFA: Pulsed Field Ablation Candidacy
gapsPushIds: Consider pulsed field ablation candidacy evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-PFA

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-WPW: WPW Syndrome Detection
gapsPushIds: Consider EP study for WPW syndrome risk stratification
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-WPW

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-DRONEDARONE: Dronedarone Contraindication Check
gapsPushIds: Dronedarone contraindicated in ${arm}
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-DRONEDARONE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-FLUTTER-OAC: Atrial Flutter OAC
gapsPushIds: Oral anticoagulant not prescribed in atrial flutter
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-FLUTTER-OAC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-IST-IVABRADINE: Inappropriate Sinus Tachycardia Treatment
gapsPushIds: Consider ivabradine for inappropriate sinus tachycardia
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-IST-IVABRADINE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-PVC-CM: PVC-Induced Cardiomyopathy Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider PVC-induced cardiomyopathy evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-PVC-CM

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-LQTS-BB: Long QT Syndrome Beta-Blocker
gapsPushIds: Beta-blocker not prescribed in Long QT syndrome
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-LQTS-BB

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-SUBCLINICAL-AF: Subclinical AF Detection in Device Patients (PROXY)
gapsPushIds: Consider subclinical AF screening via device interrogation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-SUBCLINICAL-AF

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-ICD-PROGRAMMING: ICD Programming Optimization
gapsPushIds: Consider ICD programming optimization review
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-ICD-PROGRAMMING

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-LEAD-INTEGRITY: Lead Integrity Monitoring
gapsPushIds: Consider lead integrity assessment for aging ICD system
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-LEAD-INTEGRITY

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-AAD-POST-ABLATION: Antiarrhythmic Review Post-Ablation
gapsPushIds: Consider antiarrhythmic drug review post-ablation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-AAD-POST-ABLATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-SECONDARY-ICD: Secondary Prevention ICD
gapsPushIds: Consider secondary prevention ICD evaluation for cardiac arrest survivor
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-SECONDARY-ICD

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-ACHD-ARRHYTHMIA: Adult CHD Arrhythmia Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider arrhythmia screening in adult congenital heart disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-ACHD-ARRHYTHMIA

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-TORSADES: Torsades Risk with Multiple QT-Prolonging Drugs
gapsPushIds: Torsades de pointes risk: prolonged QTc with QT-prolonging medication(s)
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-TORSADES

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-EARLY-RHYTHM: Early Rhythm Control in Newly Diagnosed AF
gapsPushIds: Consider early rhythm control strategy evaluation for atrial fibrillation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-EARLY-RHYTHM

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-VT-ABLATION: VT Ablation Referral
gapsPushIds: Consider VT ablation referral for recurrent ventricular tachycardia with ICD shocks
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-VT-ABLATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-SVT-ABLATION: SVT Ablation Referral
gapsPushIds: Consider catheter ablation referral for recurrent supraventricular tachycardia
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-SVT-ABLATION

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-BRUGADA: Brugada Syndrome Screening (PROXY)
gapsPushIds: Consider Brugada syndrome screening in young patient with unexplained syncope
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-BRUGADA

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-ARVC: ARVC Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider ARVC evaluation in young patient with cardiomyopathy and ventricular tachycardia
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-ARVC

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-CARDIAC-SARCOID-EP: Cardiac Sarcoid Arrhythmia Screening
gapsPushIds: Consider cardiac sarcoidosis arrhythmia evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-CARDIAC-SARCOID-EP

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-PACEMAKER-UPGRADE: Pacemaker to CRT Upgrade Evaluation
gapsPushIds: Consider pacemaker upgrade to CRT evaluation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-PACEMAKER-UPGRADE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-AF-STROKE-RISK: CHA2DS2-VASc Formal Documentation
gapsPushIds: Consider formal CHA2DS2-VASc score documentation for AF stroke risk stratification
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-AF-STROKE-RISK

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-CARDIOVERSION-TIMING: Cardioversion Timing Assessment
gapsPushIds: Consider cardioversion timing assessment for atrial fibrillation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-CARDIOVERSION-TIMING

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-TEE-PRE-CV: TEE Before Cardioversion
gapsPushIds: Consider TEE before cardioversion in AF without adequate anticoagulation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-TEE-PRE-CV

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-CIED-MRI: MRI-Conditional CIED Documentation
gapsPushIds: Consider MRI-conditional status documentation for cardiac implantable device
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-CIED-MRI

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-GENERATOR-REPLACEMENT: Generator Replacement Planning
gapsPushIds: Consider generator replacement planning review for aging CIED patient
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-GENERATOR-REPLACEMENT

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-INAPPROPRIATE-SHOCKS: ICD Inappropriate Shock Workup (PROXY; serves GAP-EP-050 + GAP-EP-089)
gapsPushIds: Consider ICD programming review for inappropriate shock prevention in AF patient
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-INAPPROPRIATE-SHOCKS

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-EXERCISE-EP: Exercise Testing for Exercise-Induced Arrhythmia
gapsPushIds: Consider exercise stress testing for arrhythmia characterization
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-EXERCISE-EP

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-AF-CATHETER-TIMING: AF Ablation Timing Optimization
gapsPushIds: Consider catheter ablation timing optimization for AF on antiarrhythmic therapy
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-AF-CATHETER-TIMING

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-PILL-IN-POCKET: Pill-in-Pocket Strategy for Paroxysmal AF
gapsPushIds: Consider pill-in-pocket strategy for paroxysmal AF without structural heart disease
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-PILL-IN-POCKET

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-LEFT-ATRIAL-SIZE: Left Atrial Size Documentation
gapsPushIds: Consider left atrial size documentation for AF management planning
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-LEFT-ATRIAL-SIZE

evaluatorBlocks.commentLiteral: // EP-ANTICOAG-SCORE-REASSESS: Annual CHA2DS2-VASc Reassessment
gapsPushIds: Consider annual CHA2DS2-VASc score reassessment for AF patient on anticoagulation
evaluatorBlocks.name: EP-ANTICOAG-SCORE-REASSESS
